_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Commercial management involves exploring commercial opportunities whilst complying with the regulations on how we conduct and manage both internal and third party relationships.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including roadmap prioritization, consumer discovery, feedback loops, and value measurement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.376), DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.358).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.3/10 (raw 0.227). Shared vocabulary: [management]. DDaT-only terms [commercial, complying, conduct, exploring, internal, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.861, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:71.7%, C:28.2%). No dominant classification for "Commercial management involves exploring commercial opportunities whilst complyi" vs "Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.392 > STS 0.227 (gap +0.165). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.1%. Shared tokens: [management]. DDaT-only: [commercial, complying, conduct, exploring, internal, involves]. WIDAI-only: [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge].
